title: hieracium cernagorae subsp. pseudotommasinii
intro: Hieracium cernagorae subsp. pseudotommasinii, also known as a subspecies of the Cernova hawkweed, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium cernagorae subsp. pseudotommasinii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and effectiveness.
